manifest: ai-authoring-experiment/v2 — the SCALE axis (the scale-floor rematch)
designed: 2026-06-15 (R523 manifest round; sha256 of this manifest pinned in the R523 ledger entry BEFORE any author/judge subagent runs — the R453/R499/R503/R514/R519 pre-commit pattern). The SCALE axis was routed by R520's pre-committed decision rule (pins-hold+coherent -> SCALE) and the authoring CONTRACT it uses was DESIGNED at R521 (top-down skeleton-first + structural backreference; design-doc sec 7.27 + the R521 ledger). The one gate the contract needs — the evidence-reachability extension — was BUILT at R522 (continuity::EvidenceUnreachable).
lineage_note: DESIGNED by the lineage that scoped the AI-self-authoring axis (R518) and defined the scale contract (R521) + built the gate (R522). Per the R469/R500 contamination bound this lineage may NOT author the fact base or blind-judge it; it writes this manifest + the PREMISE (the human's premise/high-level-direction role per the AI-first doctrine) + the author/judge briefs, and orchestrates the deterministic gates + manuscript assembly only.

question.primary: Does premise -> AI-self-authored causal coherence HOLD ABOVE the 60-scene scale-floor — the size at which the prose-first authoring loop LOST (the scale-floor experiment R473-R479: 'store-consistency != causal coherence', a store that gates clean yet does not add up to a story)? R520 established the small-scale baseline (14 scenes: pins held, judges unanimous 5/5 coherent). This is the REMATCH at 60-72 scenes with the R521 authoring contract.
question.what_is_new_vs_v1: TWO things change from the R520 baseline: (1) SCALE — 60-72 scenes, >=2 forks, 4-6 terminal world-lines, >=4 setup->payoffs (>=2 long-range across the fork), >=2 belief frames (vs v1's 14 scenes / 1 fork / 3 worlds). (2) the R521 CONTRACT — the author works TOP-DOWN (Phase 0 skeleton tentpoles: endings + load-bearing entities + forks + reveals-with-their-setups, BEFORE detail fill) and uses STRUCTURAL backreferences (evidence citations, never free-prose allusion), so R520's two known failure modes (case-1 late-unseeded reveal, case-2 cross-branch allusion) are mitigated BY CONSTRUCTION.
question.the_scale_floor_check: PIN-A1/A2 measure store-consistency deterministically; the blind judges measure causal coherence. The decisive divergence is pins-hold-but-judges-find-incoherence at scale = 'store-consistency != causal coherence' REPRODUCED at the authoring end despite top-down + structural backrefs. Because the two known v1 failure modes are mitigated, such an incoherence would be a NEW, DEEPER source (not a repeat of those two) = the high-value finding.

premise.title: Cold Signal at Vantor Pass (FRESH, original — NOT reused)
premise.fresh_rationale: A new premise with NO pre-existing fact base — the AI invents all facts. Scoped for scale: a contained mountain railway-junction setting with a ticking clock (a relief train at dawn), an inciting record-tampering mystery, factions with divergent false beliefs, and enough dramatic surface for 60+ scenes and multiple forks. The premise supplies setting + 3 named characters + the inciting mystery + the central dramatic question + the structural constraints; everything else is the author's to invent.
premise.human_role_note: Authoring the premise is the human's role (premise / high-level direction / final review), NOT a contamination of the AI-authoring claim (the ai-first-end-to-end doctrine: the AI authors the FACTS; the human supplies the premise).

firewall.orchestrator: this lineage: writes manifest + premise + briefs; runs the deterministic gates; assembles per-world manuscripts; cross-references the controls. NEVER authors a fact or judges.
firewall.blind_author: ONE fresh-context subagent. Receives ONLY premise.md + author-brief.md. Authors the fact base (sections + facts + order) into a scratch store via mnemosyne-cli, working TOP-DOWN per the brief, using the gates as its self-consistency feedback. BLIND to: the hypothesis, the pins, the judge rubric, the decision rule, the controls, and the v1 baseline. It is told the gates exist and to self-check with them (that IS the AI-first authoring loop under test) and is told the authoring METHOD (top-down) but NOT the pin thresholds or that this is a scale rematch (no teaching-to-test).
firewall.blind_judges: 3 fresh-context subagents. Receive ONLY judge-brief.md + the per-world manuscripts (story-logic outline). BLIND to: the experiment, the hypothesis, that the outline is AI-authored, the scale-floor history, and each other.
firewall.contamination_bound: the R469 discipline (the 7th use of the sec 7.18/7.19/7.22/7.23/7.25/7.26 blind-experiment family). The lineage that designed the axis + contract + gate may not author or judge its instance.

PIN_A1_convergence.claim: PIN. The author CONVERGES to a gate-clean (store-consistent) fact base within a bounded loop budget AT SCALE.
criteria_all_required: import of the final sections.json + facts.json into a fresh empty seed store = 0 errors (loads clean), with >= 60 sections and the declared 4-6 branches registered.

validate-continuity --order: structural violations = 0 (this NOW INCLUDES the R522 EvidenceUnreachable check — every structural backreference resolves on its own world-line) AND interval violations = 0.

report-playthrough-manuscript --world W --order, for EVERY registered branch W: unplaced = 0, undecidable = 0 (every fact placed in a real world-line position). 'outside order' > 0 is EXPECTED (the other branches' scenes, correctly excluded) and is NOT a defect — the R520 over-spec correction.
PIN_A1_convergence.budget: bounded authoring loop; if the author cannot reach this at scale, PIN-A1 FAILS = the tooling-friction branch of the decision rule (recorded with the author-log iteration count). A PIN-A1 failure AT SCALE that did NOT occur at v1's small scale is itself a scale finding (convergence is the binding lever above the floor).

PIN_A2_structural_floor.claim: PIN. The converged base meets the STRUCTURAL completeness floor (the catalog of structural smells = 0) AT SCALE.
criteria_all_required: report-payoff-coverage --order: 0 dangling setups in any TERMINAL world (every payoff_expectation=expected has >=1 paying fact reachable in the world; a shared-spine setup paying off in its descendant branches counts as paid there).
report-fork-tree --order: >= 2 forks; 0 unplaced fork points; each fork has >= 2 child world-lines; 4-6 terminal world-lines total; every world-line reaches a terminal.
report-timeline-gaps --world W --order, every W: 0 gap / 0 unreached scene.

validate-continuity: succession_cross_branch = 0 AND fact_canon_off_branch = 0 AND evidence_unreachable = 0 (no fact's coordinate OR backreference references a coordinate off its own world-line = the R488 + R522 off-branch family).

judged_no_pin.procedure: 3 fresh blind judges, judge-brief.md rubric, over the orchestrator-assembled per-world manuscripts (report-playthrough-manuscript --world W --order, one per world-line). Single arm (a capability test, no A/B).
judged_no_pin.axes: causal coherence / completeness / relevance-salience / branch integrity / overall (1-5 each, scene-id-cited).
judged_no_pin.control_crossref: TWO free isolation signals (orchestrator computes, judges blind): (1) the R520 v1 base (14 scenes) was judged unanimous 5/5 coherent — the small-scale bar; does coherence HOLD at 4-5x the scale? (2) the scale-floor experiment (R473-R479) found prose-first authoring at ~60 scenes produced store-consistent-but-incoherent results; does facts-first top-down authoring at the same scale AVOID that?
judged_no_pin.outcome_pin: NONE. The procedure is pinned; the coherence verdict at scale is the open question.

decision_rule_pre_committed.both_pins_hold_and_coherent: BOTH pins hold AND judges find it coherent (majority overall >= 4/5, no major unresolved holes) => premise->self-authored coherence HOLDS above the 60-scene floor => AI-self-authoring SCALES; the scale-floor 'store-consistency != causal coherence' did NOT reproduce even at scale with the top-down + structural-backref contract. This is the strong positive result: the North-Star authoring loop is reachable at novella scale. Next frontier becomes a DIFFERENT axis (convergence-JOIN / salience / pinion-projection), not more authoring-coherence proof.
decision_rule_pre_committed.both_pins_hold_but_incoherent: BOTH pins hold but judges find it INCOHERENT at scale (low coherence/completeness despite clean gates, beyond the two R521-mitigated modes) => 'store-consistency != causal coherence' REPRODUCED at AUTHORING at scale => the scale-floor finding confirmed at the authoring end, and a NEW/DEEPER incoherence source identified (since case-1/case-2 are mitigated by construction). HIGH-VALUE: the judge-cited failure mode names the next lever (the completeness-aggregation read-surface from sec 7.26, or salience R505, now with measured pull at scale).
decision_rule_pre_committed.pin_a1_fails: the author cannot converge to gate-clean within the bounded budget at scale => authoring-loop TOOLING friction is the binding lever above the floor => characterize the friction (what the author could not get past) + build the aggregation read-surface (sec 7.26) and/or re-scope, then re-run. A convergence failure unique to scale is itself a finding.
decision_rule_pre_committed.pin_a2_fails: convergence reached but a structural-floor smell remains (a dangling payoff / an unreached terminal / an off-branch or unreachable-evidence reference the author left in) => the structural gates found a real defect the author missed at scale => record it; the gates did their job, the authoring loop needs the catalog surfaced more aggressively (sec 7.26 aggregation surface).

evidence_reachability_observation.note: BONUS (not a pin): record whether the R522 EvidenceUnreachable gate FIRED during the author's loop (the author-log will show it if a backreference pointed off-branch or forward and the author had to fix it). A live fire = Piece B catching a real case-2 at scale = field validation of R522. Zero fires with structural backrefs present = the contract held without the gate needing to bite. Either is informative; neither changes the pins.
evidence_reachability_observation.field_proof_target: at least one structural backreference (evidence citation to an earlier establishing scene) must be PRESENT and gate-clean in the final base, proving the contract was exercised (not avoided).

grading_procedure.step_0: orchestrator: this manifest sha256-pinned in the R523 ledger, committed pre-execution.
grading_procedure.step_1_author: spawn the blind author (premise.md + author-brief.md). It returns the gate-clean store + sections.json/facts.json/order.json + author-log.md in run/author/.
grading_procedure.step_2_pins: orchestrator runs PIN-A1 + PIN-A2 gate criteria over the author's final store, with --order run/author/order.json; records every verdict verbatim in report.md.
grading_procedure.step_3_manuscripts: orchestrator assembles one reading manuscript per world-line (report-playthrough-manuscript --world W --order), neutral (no pin/judge context).
grading_procedure.step_4_judges: spawn 3 blind judges (judge-brief.md + the manuscripts), record verdicts verbatim in run/judges/judge-{1,2,3}.md.
grading_procedure.step_5_decide: orchestrator applies the pre-committed decision rule, writes report.md, commits (R524).
grading_procedure.no_new_harness_code: reuse mnemosyne-cli verbs verbatim (incl. the R522 gate); no tools/ change. Scratch *.atomic.json stay gitignored; tracked evidence = manifest, premise, briefs, runbook, the authored sections/facts/order JSON, the per-world manuscripts, author-log.md, report.md.

predictions_preregistered.PRED_A1: PIN. Convergence at scale is the real uncertainty — 60+ scenes is a much larger consistency surface than 14. Honest expectation: LIKELY holds (the gates are local checks the author can satisfy incrementally; top-down skeleton-first reduces the late-discovery failure), but a scale convergence-friction failure is a live possibility and would be a clean finding.
predictions_preregistered.PRED_A2: PIN. Likely HOLDS (the structural floor is what the gates enforce; the author self-checks against them, now including the R522 evidence gate).
predictions_preregistered.PRED_coherence: NO pin (the OPEN question). Honest expectation is GENUINELY UNCERTAIN — this is the scale-floor rematch. The optimistic path: top-down + structural backrefs carry the v1 small-scale coherence to scale (=> SCALES). The informative alternative: coherence degrades at scale in a way the structural gates cannot see (=> the deeper finding, the completeness-aggregation lever gains measured pull). Either outcome advances the North Star; the experiment is designed so the surprise is the valuable case.
